arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains Liverpool decision that caused controversy in Carabao Cup final loss
arts.sum: Liverpool supporters were left frustrated after Newcastle's 6ft 7in defender Dan Burn scored a header from a corner when man-marked by the 5ft 9in Alexis Mac Allister at Wembley

arts.ttl: Howe amazed as Newcastle 'legends' end drought
arts.sum: Newcastle manager Eddie Howe challenged his players to win more silverware after making themselves "legends" by ending the club's 56-year trophy drought with a 2-1 Carabao Cup final win against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: David Beckham shows true colours with brilliant Newcastle United message after Carabao Cup final win
arts.sum: David Beckham has shown his true colours following Newcastle United's 2-1 win over Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final. Beckham said: "Amazing moment today for a club with some of the best and most loyal supporters in the game...

arts.ttl: Sinkhole, dodgy balls, Arsenal statement - Newcastle route to Carabao Cup glory
arts.sum: Sandro Tonali’s long-awaited return from a 10-month betting suspension was the headline, but Newcastle needed penalties to get past Nottingham Forest at the City Ground. The victory over Liverpool - Premier League leaders and one of the best teams in Europe - was a stunning end to a journey that had started way back in August.

arts.ttl: Emotional Eddie Howe holds back tears as he pays tribute to his late mum after ending Newcastle's domestic trophy drought in Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE AT WEMBLEY: The Magpies were magnificent during a 2-1 win over Liverpool in which Geordie defender Dan Burn and star striker Alexander Isak were on target.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot rejects suggestions Newcastle beat his Liverpool side in the Carabao Cup final because they were 'more hungry'
arts.sum: Arne Slot cut a dejected figure after a bruising week but the Liverpool boss disagreed that Carabao Cup winners Newcastle had been 'more hungry' than his team to win the trophy.

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota makes honest Liverpool admission after Carabao Cup final defeat - 'not good enough'
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Diogo Jota issues a message hours after the Reds were beaten by Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup final

arts.ttl: 'I feel numb' - Dan Burn reveals 'strange' feeling as Newcastle United's Wembley hero - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: It was Burn's goal that got the party started for Newcastle fans as they beat Premier League leaders Liverpool 2-1 to lift their first trophy in 70 years. Burn suggested that half-time came at a good time for Newcastle because the players were able to compose themselves after the euphoria of going 1-0 up.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes worrying Mo Salah claim and tells Liverpool to sign two players
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah had a very quiet game as Liverpool lost the Carabao Cup final 2-1 to Newcastle on Sunday - but Jamie Carragher felt the problem lies elsewhere for his old side

arts.ttl: Relentless Newcastle can fashion new identity in their moment of history | Jonathan Liew
arts.sum: After decades of being a club built on resistance, this could be moment they finally joined football’s establishment The last few minutes are a kind of perfection. Liverpool score after a video assistant referee delay to make it 2-1. Newcastle restart, pump the ball into the Liverpool corner and from that moment a kind of elemental life force seems to surge through them. This is what you came for. This is how you wanted it, where you wanted it. Remember your training. Can there be any more forlorn, godforsaken assignment than trying to wrestle Newcastle away from the corner flag in the dying seconds of a Wembley final? Curtis Jones tries and Harvey Elliott tries and Jarell Quansah tries, but these are players desperately unsuited to the task. Continue reading...
